final:
// // When EN is low and TE is high, ENCLK should follow CLK; otherwise, ENCLK should be low.
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input EN,
    input TE,
    output reg ENCLK
);always @ (posedge CLK) begin
    if (EN == 1'b1 && TE == 1'b0) begin
        ENCLK <= CLK;
    end else begin
        ENCLK <= 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When EN is low and TE is high, ENCLK should follow CLK; otherwise, ENCLK should be low.
